sections.summary: YOUR RELIABLE DATA SOURCE www.ess.gov.et The Consumer Price Index (CPI), a key economic statistics, is surveyed, analyzed, and made available to data users on a monthly basis. The year - on - year, general inflation rate (annual percentage change) in the country stood at 13.7 percent for the month of July EFY2017.
